sections.surf: Primary swell of 1.6 m from the SW with an 8 second period will provide waist to chest-high waves, with a secondary swell of 1.4 m from the SW adding texture. Dawn winds from the east at 3.7 m/s are offshore and will keep the surface clean. Afternoon winds ease to 3.1 m/s from the NE, maintaining quality conditions through the day.
sections.weather: Sunny conditions with light winds and a daytime maximum of 20°C. Morning fog possible, low chance of rain at 10%.
sections.wind: Dawn winds from the east at 3.7 m/s are offshore and clean; afternoon winds ease to 3.1 m/s from the NE.
sections.ocean: Water temperature 19.8°C with a light current of 0.2 m/s.
sections.uv: Moderate UV index of 3. Sunrise 07:08 AWST, sunset 17:26 AWST.
sections.fire: Fire danger rated Moderate. Open burning permitted without a permit; ensure proper precautions and adult supervision.
